highlights.description: New `chartir` package providing a non-polymorphic intermediate representation for charts, compilable to ECharts, PNG/SVG, and other formats

added.description: `charts/chartir` package with ChartIR types: datasets, marks, axes, legend, tooltip, grid
`charts/chartir/wchart` compiler for PNG/SVG output via go-analyze/charts
11 geometry types: line, bar, pie, scatter, area, radar, funnel, gauge, heatmap, treemap, sankey
Typed constants for axis types, positions, column types, and tooltip triggers
